description: User clicks on a filter icon in the 'Filters' pane on the right side of the screen.

description: The bar chart updates in response to the filter, with the 'Agree' (5) bar increasing from 70% to 80%.

description: User clicks the filter icon again to toggle the filter off.

description: The bar chart updates back to its original state, with the 'Agree' bar returning to 70%.
